name: Magnetic Force Calculator
description: Calculate magnetic force on moving charge.
seo_description: Use our free magnetic force on charge calculator to quickly estimate force based on q, v, b. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate force on 1C charge at 5 m/s in 0.5T field.
result_context: The magnetic force {force} N acts perpendicular to both velocity and magnetic field.
